# terrible_vmware_vmware_appliance_info (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `properties` (String) Specify the properties to retrieve. If not specified, all properties are retrieved.

### Read-Only

- `appliance` (String) Information about appliance.
